Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 4, 222A [sale of prebend][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[IM GIŠ].⸢ŠUB⸣ lu₂GAL-DU₃u₂-tu IGI dGAŠAN-ša₂-UNUGki

(o 1) [Tablet of] the rab-banûtu prebend before Beltu-ša-Uruk on the 3rd day of Abu, the 3rd day of Ululu (and) the 3rd day of Tašritu consisting of 3 pānu 3 sūtu of arable land on the Harriṣu canal which (is) at the city gate of Šamaš of the sector of Uruk.

o 22

[U₄] ⸢3⸣-KAM₂ ša₂ itiNE U₄ 3-KAM₂ ša₂ itiKIN U₄ 3-[KAM₂]

o 33

⸢ša₂⸣ itiDU₆ IGI 3(BARIG) 3(BAN₂) <ŠE>.NUMUNu₂-šu₂ ša₂ muḫ-ḫi

o 44

id₂ḫar-ri-ṣu ša₂ ina KA₂.GAL dUTU NAM UNUGki

o 55

US₂.SA.DU ANu₂ DA BAD₃ u US₂.SA.DU

(o 5) Upper length adjacent to the city wall and boundary [...] of Balaṭu, son of Šulaya and son of his father's brother [...], lower length adjacent to the field belonging of the field of [...] Šamaš-zer-lišir, son of Šamaš-iddin, descendant of Rab-bani.

o 66

[... mba]-⸢la⸣-ṭu A-šu₂ ša₂ mšu-la-a u DUMU ŠEŠ AD-šu₂

o 77

[... US₂].⸢SA⸣.DU KIu₂ DA A.ŠA₃ lib₃-bu-u₂ A.ŠA₃

o 88

[... md]UTU—NUMUN—GIŠ A-šu₂ ša₂ md⸢UTU—MU A⸣ lu₂GAL-DU₃

o 99

[... x] ⸢MA⸣.NA KU₃.BABBAR ša₂ gi-ni ⸢a-na⸣ ŠAM₂

(o 9) He gave [x] minas of silver with the ginnu-mark for the price [...] to Isu, son of Mukin-apli, descendant of Gimil-Nanaya.

o 1010

[...] x a-na mi-su A-šu₂ ša₂ mDU—A

o 1111

[A mŠU—d]⸢na⸣-na-a id-din PAP 2 MA.NA 7 GIN₂ ⸢KU₃.BABBAR⸣

(o 11) The total (is) 2 minas 7 shekels of silver [with the ginnu-mark together with 7 shekels] of silver which have accordingly been given as the additional (payment).

o 1212

[ša₂ gi-ni a-di 7 GIN₂] KU₃.BABBAR ša₂ a-ki-i pi-i a-tar SUM.NA

o 1313

[... mdUTU—NUMUN—GIŠ] ⸢ŠAM₂⸣ GIŠ.ŠUB-šu₂ ki-i kas₃-pi

(o 13) [... Šamaš-zer-lišir] has received the price of his prebend for payment [from] the hand of Isu, son of Mukin-apli, descendant of Gimil-Nanaya. He is paid.

o 1414

[i-na] ⸢ŠU m⸣i-⸢su⸣ A-šu₂ ša₂ mDU—A A <m>ŠU—dna-na-a

o 1515

[ma-ḫir a]-pil [za-ki] ru-gum₂-ma-a ul i-ši

(o 15) He is free (from claim). It will be no claim. They will not return and they will not raise a claim against each other.

o 1616

[ul] ⸢i⸣-tur-⸢ru⸣-[ma a-na] ⸢a⸣-ḫa-miš ul i-rag-gu-mu

o 1717

⸢ma⸣-ti-ma ⸢ina EGIR⸣ [u₄]-mu ina ŠEŠ-MEŠ DUMU-MEŠ

(o 17) At any time in the future, (anyone) from the brothers, sons, family, relatives (or) clients of the house of Šamaš-zer-lišir who will raise a claim concerning the rab-banûtu prebend, induce (somebody) to make a claim, retract, raise a claim (or) provide a claimant saying: "That field was not sold, the silver was not received", he will repay the silver (Šamaš-zer-lišir) received twelvefold.

o 1818

IM.RI.A [IM.RI].⸢A⸣ sa-la-tu₄ ša₂ E₂

o 1919

mdUTU—NUMUN—⸢GIŠ⸣ ša₂ E₁₁-ma a-na muḫ-ḫi

o 2020

GIŠ.ŠUB lu₂⸢GAL⸣-DU₃u₂-tu i-dab-bu-ub

o 2121

u₂-šad-ba-bu in-nu-⸢u₂⸣ u₂-pa-qa-ru

o 2222

pa-qa-ra-nu u₂-⸢šar⸣-[šu-u₂] um-ma A.ŠA₃

o 2323

MU-MEŠ ul SUM-ma kas₃-pi ul ma-ḫir <i-qab-bu-u₂ kas₃-pi im-ḫu-ru>

Bottom
b.e. 1b.e. 1

a-di 12-TA.AM₃ ⸢i⸣-ta-<na>-ap-pal

b.e. 22

ḪA.LA ša₂ mdUTU—NUMUN—GIŠ ša₂ it-ti

(b.e. 2) Share of Šamaš-zer-lišir which (is owned) with Ša-pi-Anu, his brother.

b.e. 33

[m]ša₂—pi—d60 ŠEŠ-šu₂

Reverse
r 1r 1

ina ka-nak na₄KIŠIB MU-MEŠ

(r 1) At the sealing of these sealed tablets, before Nabu-apla-iddin, son of Tabne, descendant of Bel-lumur; Ša-pi-Anu, son of Šamaš-eṭir, descendant of Rab-banî; Anu-balassu-iqbi, son of Šamaš-zer-ukin, descendant of Pir˒ušu; Anu-ikṣur, son of Kudurranu, descendant of Nur-Sin; Šamaš-eṭir, son of Anu-dan, descendant of Kuri; Anu-zer-iddin, son of Hahhuru; Nanaya-iddin, son of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Rab-banî; Libluṭ, son of Šamaš-zer-ibni, descendant of Balassu; Anu-zer-iddin, son of Šamaš-per˒u-uṣur, descendant of PN; Šamaš-kaṣir, son of Ištar-zer-...; Nabu-nadin, son of Aplaya [...].

r 22

IGI mdNA₃—A—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mtab-ne₂-e A! mdBE—IGI

r 33

mša₂-pi-i—d60 A-šu₂ ša₂ ⸢m⸣dUTU—SUR A lu₂GAL-DU₃

r 44

md60—DIN-su—E ⸢A-šu₂ ša₂⸣ mdUTU—NUMUN—DU A mpir-ʾi-šu₂

r 55

md60—ik-ṣur A-šu₂ ⸢ša₂ m⸣NIG₂.DUnu A mZALAG₂—d30

r 66

mdUTU—SUR A-šu₂ ša₂ md60—KAL A mkur-i

r 77

md60—NUMUN—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mḫa-aḫ-ḫu-ru

r 88

mdna-na-a—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mni-din-tu₄—d60 A lu₂GAL-DU₃

r 99

mlib-luṭ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—NUMUN—DU₃ A mba-lat-⸢su⸣

r 1010

[m]d60—NUMUN—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—NUNUZ—URI₃ A mx-x-[...]

r 1111

[m]⸢dUTU⸣—KAD₂ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdINNIN.NA—[NUMUN—x ...]

r 1212

[md]NA₃—⸢na⸣-din A-šu₂ ša₂ m⸢ap⸣-[la-a ...]

r 1313

[...] x [...]

r 1414

[...] ⸢iti?APIN?⸣ [...]

(r 14) [Uruk, nth day] of Arahsamnu, [year x], Darius, [...], king of all the lands.

r 1515

[... mda]-⸢a-ri⸣-ia-muš

r 1616

[...] x ⸢LUGAL⸣ KUR.KUR

r 1717

[ṣu-pur m...]-x ⸢ki⸣-ma na₄KIŠIB-šu₂

(r 17) [Nail of NP] is marked instead of his seal.

r 1818

[tu-ud?-da?-a]-tu₂
